diagrams.title: Exception Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the flow of control when an exception is thrown and caught
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete exception handling mechanism in C++

diagrams.title: Stack Unwinding Process
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how local objects are destroyed as exception propagates up the call stack
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing resource cleanup during exception propagation

diagrams.title: Exception Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the inheritance relationship of standard C++ exception classes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception types and their relationships
